title: Remove the old tag input
summary: Delete the old inline tag-editing code now that the new tag editor has taken over.
motivation: Remove the legacy inline tag-editing code now that NoteTagEditor owns it. Stage 3 of 3 (new then edit then delete): assumes note-tags-edit is merged, so nothing references the old code.

included: remove legacy tag-input markup and handlers from AppShell
